calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default and Default Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff's case is dismissed without prejudice pursuant to Plaintiff's Memorandum of Points and Authorities, p. 2. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489
=(302/EHG)
